title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed to go public. M.G. Siegler discusses the significance of Anthropic's IPO filing before OpenAI, analyzes Claude's current capabilities, and questions whether the company needs the capital raised through the offering.
